nasb.text: In that day I will carry out against Eli all that I have spoken concerning his house, from beginning to end.

esv.text: On that day I will fulfill against Eli all that I have spoken concerning his house, from beginning to end.

cnv.text: 在那日，我必在以利身上徹底實現我論到他的家所說的一切話。

ccb.text: 到时候，我要应验我说的有关以利家的一切预言。
